ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT LORINDA KAY FORBES AKA KIM DERRINGER THOMAS J. MARRABLE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LORINDA KAY FORBES AKA KIM DERRINGER THOMAS J. MARRABLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 730 EDDY STREET, #222, SF, CA $1,760.41 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,760.41, STAYED UNTIL AUG-16-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER 0 JUDGMENT FROM DEFT LORIND KAY FORBES, AKA KIM DERRINGER, BUT RECOVER $1,760.41 FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS J. MARRABLE. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
